# Dori

> Premium, sustainable activewear designed in Mumbai for women — made to move with you, with a focus on comfort, fit, and quiet confidence.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand introduction and featured pieces.
- [Collections](/collections): Shop the full range of activewear.
- [About](/about): The Dori atelier, founders' story, and craft philosophy.
- [Sustainability](/sustainability): Our materials, ethics, and sourcing.
- [Contact](/contact): Mumbai studio details and customer support.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about sizing, fit, and orders.
- [Size Guide](/size-guide): Measurements and fit guidance.
- [Care Instructions](/care-instructions): How to care for your Dori pieces.
- [Shipping & Returns](/shipping-returns): Shipping, exchange, and refund policy.
